description: Single-Family Residential (Group R-3) submittal checklist for the City of Oakland, based on 2022 California Building Code cycle.

items.description: Plot plan showing property lines, setbacks, existing and proposed improvements, north arrow, and scale
items.notes: Show adjacent structures within 10 feet of property lines. Include APN and legal description.

items.description: Oakland Planning Department clearance or approval number noted on the application cover sheet
items.notes: Required before Building Services Division acceptance. Design Review approval required for projects exceeding 2,500 sqft new construction.

items.description: Geotechnical investigation report for sites within Liquefaction Hazard Zone or Alquist-Priolo Fault Zone
items.notes: Required if site falls within Oakland hazard zones per Planning Department GIS portal.

items.description: Grading and drainage plan with existing and proposed grades, finish floor elevation, and drainage flow direction
items.notes: Must be signed by licensed civil engineer or surveyor where grading exceeds 50 cubic yards.

items.description: Accessible parking stall with dimensions, slope, and route to building entrance (if off-street parking is provided)
items.notes: Required if parking is provided. One accessible stall per parking lot up to 25 total stalls.

items.description: Foundation plan with type, dimensions, reinforcement, and anchor bolt layout
items.notes: Minimum 3.5-inch slab thickness. Include post-tension design by licensed engineer if applicable.

items.description: Anchor bolt schedule: minimum 1/2-inch diameter at 6-foot maximum spacing with 3x3x1/4-inch plate washers in SDC D
items.notes: Oakland Seismic Design Category D. Plate washers required at all anchor bolts.

items.description: Floor plan(s) with all rooms labeled, dimensioned, and door/window tags keyed to schedules
items.notes: Minimum 1/8-inch scale. ADU floor plans (if applicable) on separate sheets.

items.description: Roof framing or truss layout plan with member sizes, species/grade, spacing, and spans
items.notes: Truss manufacturer sealed drawings required at permit issuance.

items.description: Shear wall schedule and layout plan with hold-down product numbers and locations
items.notes: Include ICC-ES evaluation report number for all hold-down hardware.

items.description: Building sections (min. 2) and exterior elevations (all 4 sides) with finish material and height dimensions
items.notes: Oakland Zoning maximum height per OMC Chapter 17. Include shadow study for hillside projects.

items.description: NFPA 13D automatic fire sprinkler system plans or concurrent deferred submittal pre-approval from Oakland Fire Prevention Bureau
items.notes: Required for all new SFR in Oakland. Oakland FPB concurrent review required.

items.description: Smoke alarm locations on all floor plans, hard-wired and interconnected with battery backup
items.notes: Required in each sleeping room, outside sleeping areas, and on each story.

items.description: Carbon monoxide alarm locations shown on floor plans
items.notes: Required within 15 feet of each sleeping room where any gas appliance or attached garage is present.

items.description: Mechanical plans showing all HVAC equipment locations, duct routing, and equipment schedule with CFM and efficiency ratings
items.notes: All-electric HVAC strongly preferred per Oakland Equitable Climate Action Plan (ECAP). Gas heating requires written justification.

items.description: Kitchen and bathroom exhaust ventilation with CFM rates, duct routing, and exterior termination
items.notes: Kitchen minimum 100 CFM. Bathroom minimum 50 CFM or 110 CFM intermittent per ASHRAE 62.2.

items.description: Electrical floor plan with panel location, circuit layout, outlet locations, AFCI/GFCI designations
items.notes: Clearly label AFCI protected circuits (all habitable rooms) and GFCI protected locations.

items.description: Panel schedule with circuit numbers, breaker sizes, conductor sizes, loads, and reserved capacity for future all-electric appliances
items.notes: Minimum 200-amp service for new SFR per Oakland local amendment.

items.description: EV-ready charging infrastructure: dedicated 240V/50A circuit at garage or primary parking space
items.notes: Required per Title 24 Part 6 solar/EV readiness and Oakland ECAP. NEMA 14-50 or listed EVSE.

items.description: CF-1R Certificate of Compliance (CalCERTS or CHEERS registered) included with plan set as a named sheet
items.notes: Registration number and date printed on document. Must match all insulation/window values on plans.

items.description: Solar PV-ready conduit pathway and reserved breaker noted on electrical plans
items.notes: Minimum 1-inch conduit from main panel to attic/roof. Reserved breaker labeled 'Solar PV — Future'.

items.description: Plumbing plan and isometric with all supply, DWV lines, and fixture unit count per CPC
items.notes: Show sewer lateral connection with 4-inch minimum diameter and minimum 1/4 inch per foot slope.

items.description: WaterSense fixture compliance table listing all fixtures with flow rates meeting Oakland requirements
items.notes: Oakland adopts CALGreen Tier 1 as mandatory: lavatory 1.2 gpm, shower 1.8 gpm, toilet 1.28 gpf.

items.description: CALGreen mandatory checklist (Oakland adopts Tier 1 as mandatory baseline) signed by designer
items.notes: Oakland Building Services Division accepts the state CALGreen Tier 1 checklist form.

items.description: Construction Waste Management Plan with 65 percent minimum diversion from landfill
items.notes: Identify recycling facilities and haulers. Post-construction Diversion Report required before final.
